member.name: T:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants
member.summary: 水池模型常量：规格第七节、第一节、十四节已定。详见 记忆库/domain/代码常量与公式对应。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.BaseValueT
member.summary: 基础值_T（B_T）：每日基础衰减 = 1/(B_T×有效药效系数)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.BaseValueTBirth
member.summary: 分娩时 L 增量（不乘有效药效系数），单位与 L 一致（归一化容量）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.EffectiveDrugFactorMin
member.summary: 有效药效系数下限：max(1−耐受, 0.05)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.NegativeFeedbackK
member.summary: 负反馈系数 k：每日衰减 = 1/(B_T×E) + k×L。τ≈1/k 游戏日。建议 [0.002, 0.05]。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.LactationEndEpsilon
member.summary: L 下限：L 小于此值时视为 0，泌乳结束。避免浮点长期接近 0 不结束。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.BaseAbsorptionDelayTicks
member.summary: 吸收延迟：基准 tick 数（0.25 游戏日）。实际延迟 = BaseAbsorptionDelayTicks × factor，factor = Lerp(1.5, 0.5, InverseLerp(0.25, 2, Clamp(代谢率, 0.25, 2)))，不做除法避免爆炸。见 记忆库/decisions/ADR-002-吸收延迟基准。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.StretchCapFactor
member.summary: 满池撑大：单侧最大水位 = HalfPool × StretchCapFactor（规格：暂时允许超过基础容量）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.OverflowFilthThreshold
member.summary: 溢出污物：累计溢出量达到此阈值时生成 1 格地面污物（不扣水位）。改小则更容易出污物。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.ShrinkPerStep
member.summary: 排水后回缩：每 60 tick 超出基础容量部分乘以 (1 - ShrinkPerStep)，约 1 游戏日回缩到基础容量。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.DoseToLFactor
member.summary: 剂量转 L 系数 C_dose：ΔL = Δs × C_dose × E_tol(t_before)。默认 1。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Constants.PoolModelConstants.NutritionPerPoolUnit
member.summary: 1 池单位 = 1 营养（设计对等）：产奶花 1 营养得 1 池、喝奶花 1 池得 1 营养。ExtraNutritionPerDay = flow×本值；Need_Food 补丁按此扣饱食度，CompPartialMilk 食用时 fillAmount 直接作营养。原版饱食条 0..MaxLevel(≈1)，泌乳时额外掉条属设计。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.MilkCumDefOf.EM_FirstLactationDrug
member.summary: 首次药物诱发泌乳成就类记忆。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.MilkCumDefOf.EM_FirstLactationBirth
member.summary: 首次分娩泌乳成就类记忆。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.MilkCumDefOf.EM_LongTermDrugLactation
member.summary: 长期药物泌乳情境心情（药物诱发且持续约 15 天以上）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.MilkCumDefOf.EM_NursedBy
member.summary: 3.1：被哺乳者获得「被某人哺乳」记忆，用于社交/关系。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.MilkCumDefOf.EM_NursedSomeone
member.summary: 3.1：哺乳者获得「哺乳了某人」记忆，用于社交/关系。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MainTabIndex
member.summary: 专业级 UI：按系统类型分层。核心机制 / 健康风险 / 权限规则 / 数值平衡 / 模组联动 / 数据种族 / 调试工具（仅 DevMode）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.milkingWorkTotalBase
member.summary: 挤奶流速基准：baseFlowPerSecond = 60/本值（池单位/秒）。默认 60 → 满池约 1 瓶/秒（现实时间）；调大则变慢。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.breastfeedCapacityFactor
member.summary: 按容量量化：吸奶有效时间随喂奶者 MilkAmount 的系数，effectiveTime *= (1 + 本值×(MilkAmount-1))，限制在 [0.5, 2]。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.lactationExtraNutritionBasis
member.summary: 泌乳灌满期间额外饥饿：滑块 0–300，150=1:1。饱食度每 150 tick 额外下降 = flowPerDay×(150/60000)×(本值/150)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.reabsorbNutritionEnabled
member.summary: 回缩吸收：满池回缩时，未溢出部分视为被身体吸收，按比例补充饱食度；0=关闭，1=与产奶消耗 1:1 折算。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.reabsorbNutritionEfficiency
member.summary: 回缩吸收效率：0~1，吸收的池单位折成营养的比例，默认 0.5 避免满池挂机过强。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.lactationPoolTickLog
member.summary: DevMode 且勾选时，每 60 tick 输出泌乳小人的营养/乳池/回缩/吸奶明细到日志。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.lactationDrugIntakeLog
member.summary: 勾选时，每次吃药进水（AddFromDrug）时输出调试日志：Δs、进水ΔL、剩余时间变化。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.LactationLog(System.String)
member.summary: DevMode 时输出泌乳关键路径日志，便于排查 L/池/药物/分娩 行为。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.PoolTickLog(System.String)
member.summary: 仅当 DevMode 且 lactationPoolTickLog 为 true 时输出，用于每步营养/乳池/回缩/吸奶明细。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.rjwBreastCapacityCoefficient
member.summary: 乳房容量系数：左右乳容量 = RJW Severity × 本系数，2=默认，与泌乳效率等可调项对应。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.rjwSexAddsLactationBoost
member.summary: 3.2：性行为后为泌乳参与者增加少量池进水（ΔL），可选。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.toleranceDynamicMu
member.summary: 耐受累积率 μ（每游戏日）；L 高则 E 上升。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.toleranceDynamicNu
member.summary: 耐受衰减率 ν（每游戏日）；E 自然回落。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.ProlactinToleranceGainPerDose
member.summary: 催乳素单剂在 XML 中对耐受 Hediff 的 Severity 增量（与 Lactating 同剂叠加一致，默认 0.044）；改 XML 时需同步。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetEffectiveBaseValueTForDecay
member.summary: 药物泌乳衰减用有效 B_T：由 baselineMilkDurationDays 反推，使单次剂量（L≈0.5、E=1）时剩余天数 ≈ 基准天数。D=0.5/baseline ⇒ B_T_eff=1/(0.5/baseline−k×0.5)。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetEffectiveBaseValueTForDecayBirth
member.summary: 分娩泌乳衰减用有效 B_T：由 birthInducedMilkDurationDays 反推，公式同药物。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetPressureFactor(System.Single)
member.summary: 带下限 Logistic：f(P)=f_min+(1−f_min)×1/(1+exp(k×(P−Pc)))，P 大时平滑降速，最低 f_min 永不归零。默认 k=6、Pc=0.9、f_min=0.02，奶量达 90% 才开始往下压。
member.param: 该侧满度/该侧撑大容量，0～1（可略大于 1 时仍按公式算）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetEffectiveDrive(System.Single)
member.summary: 四层模型（阶段3）：有效驱动力 D_eff = L·H(L)。H(L)=1−exp(−a·L)；若 L_ref>0 则用参考值归一：D_eff = L·(1−e^{-aL})/(1−e^{-aL_ref})，尾期更平滑。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.pressureFactorMin
member.summary: 压力曲线下限 f_min：满池时生产倍率不低于此值，永不归零。推荐 0.02～0.15。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.letdownReflexDecayLambda
member.summary: 喷乳反射衰减率 λ（每分钟）；R_new = R × exp(-λ×Δt)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.letdownReflexStimulusDeltaR
member.summary: 挤奶/吸奶时 R 的增量 ΔR，R 加上后 Clamp 至 1。设大一些（如 1）可一次刺激即满 R。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.letdownReflexBoostMultiplier
member.summary: 喷乳反射加成倍率：进水流速倍率 = 1 + R×(本值−1)，R=1 时为本值倍（建议 1.5~2.5），R=0 时为 1 倍；设为 1 即无加成。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.lactationDecayInflammationEta
member.summary: 炎症对 L 衰减的抑制因子 η：D += η·I。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.hormoneSaturationA
member.summary: H(L) 饱和系数 a；建议 0.5～1.5。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.hormoneSaturationLRef
member.summary: 参考 L 归一：D_eff = L·(1−e^{-aL})/(1−e^{-aL_ref})，使尾期更平滑；≤0 时不归一。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.adaptationTheta
member.summary: 扩容率 θ（每游戏日）；P 大于 0.85 时容量增加。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.adaptationOmega
member.summary: 回缩率 ω（每游戏日）；P 小于 1 时容量减少。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.adaptationCapMaxRatio
member.summary: 适应容量上限：不超过基础容量的此比例（如 0.2=20%）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.milkQualityInflammationWeight
member.summary: 炎症对质量的抑制系数；质量 ∝ (1 − 本值×I)，I 大则质量降。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.milkQualityProtectionFactor
member.summary: 质量对乳腺炎阈值的保护系数；有效 I_crit = I_crit×(1 + 本值×MilkQuality)。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.EnsureScribeDeepTypes
member.summary: 确保 Scribe_Deep 反序列化的对象类型正确，避免旧存档或类型变更导致 InvalidCastException。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetDefaultMilkProduct(Verse.ThingDef)
member.summary: 设计原则 3/4：默认产奶开关与奶量来自 Def（Humanlike/体型），不手写底层规则；实际开关由 namesToProducts + 设置决定。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.IsProducerRestrictionConsumersEffectiveForMilkProducts
member.summary: 奶标签联动：产主限制「谁可以吃我的奶制品」仅当奶标签里对应物品种类开启「显示动物名」时生效。本方法为 true 时，产主限制窗口显示该区块。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.IsProducerRestrictionConsumersEffectiveForCumProducts
member.summary: 奶标签联动：产主限制「谁可以吃我的精液制品」仅当奶标签里精液开启「显示动物名」时生效。本方法为 true 时，产主限制窗口显示该区块。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetRaceDrugDeltaSMultiplier(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 当前催乳素耐受严重度 t ∈ [0,1]；完全由游戏内 Hediff/Comp 决定。
3.3 动物差异化：种族对催乳药物进水倍率，未配置则 1。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetProlactinToleranceFactor(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 统一耐受系数：E_tol(t) = max(1 − t, 0.05)。启用耐受动态时由 comp 的 E 计算。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetProlactinToleranceFactorFromE(System.Single)
member.summary: 耐受动态：由 mod 维护的 E 得到 E_tol = [max(1−E, 0.05)]^exponent。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkCumSettings.GetProlactinToleranceFactor(System.Single)
member.summary: 统一耐受系数（按严重度 t）：E_tol(t) = [max(1 − t, 0.05)]^exponent；allowToleranceAffectMilk 关闭时恒为 1。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkRiskSettings
member.summary: 建议 13：乳腺炎/风险与耐受相关设置分组，便于序列化与 UI；ExposeData 仍写旧 key 以兼容存档。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.Settings.MilkRiskSettings.mastitisMtbDaysMultiplierHumanlike
member.summary: 建议 8：人形/动物乳腺炎 MTB 乘数，便于区分平衡。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Core.Stats.StatWorker_PawnOnlySafe
member.summary: 仅在有 Pawn 的 StatRequest 下显示，避免信息卡在 StatsReportUtility.StatsToDraw 中枚举 StatDef 时 对物品/Def 请求调用默认 StatWorker.ShouldShowFor(req) 导致 NRE / 列表错位（见 ADR-004、报错修复记录）。 用于 DrugDurationMultiplier 等仅需在小人信息卡显示的统计。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink
member.summary: 精液�?�?泵关联床：可链接到一张床�? 链接后仅床主可使用，产主精液 = 床主（即收集的精液一律记为床主产生）�? 未链接时多人可使用，多人用过则为混合精液（无产主）�? 若罐内已有精液且产主不是该床的床主，则无法链接到该床（CanLinkToBed �?false，弹窗提示）�?

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.Owner
member.summary: 床主（通过 CompAssignableToPawn 获取，兼容各版本）

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.IsSharedRoom
member.summary: 共享卧室：房间内多张床，或链接的床无主

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.HasContent
member.summary: 桶格上有精液物品即视为有占用

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.CanLinkToBed(RimWorld.Building_Bed)
member.summary: 桶内有精液时，仅当所有精液均属于该床主（或无产主）时才允许关联；否则返回 false 并应由调用方提示无法链接

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.CanPawnUse(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 该小人是否被允许使用此桶（做 DeflateBucket 等）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.ShouldWarnNotYourBucket(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 是否应提示“不属于他的精液桶”（有占用且不是他的桶）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.NotifyPawnUsed(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 记录该小人向此桶排放了一次；若多人用过则后续产出为混合精液

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.IsMixed
member.summary: 是否已有多人使用过（产出应为混合精液）

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GatherResourcesIntervalDays
member.summary: 产出周期已移除，挤奶间隔固定为 1 天（水池模型不依赖此值）

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.breastfedAmount
member.summary: 吸奶 session 累计量（池单位，1 池 = 1 瓶）。吸奶统一到 Drain 后由 ChildcareHelper 累加，结束时用于 amountFed/心情/outcomeDoers。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.leftFullness
member.summary: 水池模型：左乳水位（0～左乳容量），与右乳合计 0～maxFullness；总容量 = 左+右（正常为 1+1=2）。由 SyncLeftRightFromBreastFullness 从 breastFullness 汇总

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.rightFullness
member.summary: 水池模型：右乳水位（0～右乳基础容量），与左乳合计 0～maxFullness

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.breastFullness
member.summary: 按单个 key（Part.def.defName 或 defName_L/R）的水位，用于左1/右1/左2/右2 独立进水与展示。有则优先；无则由 left/right 反推

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.Fullness
member.summary: 当前总奶量（0~maxFullness），双池和 = leftFullness + rightFullness；对外只读

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.allowedSucklers
member.summary: 谁可以使用我的奶。名单为空时会预填子女/伴侣；仅名单内的人可吸奶/挤奶

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.allowedConsumers
member.summary: 谁可以使用我产出的奶/精液制品（不含自己，自己始终允许）。空列表 = 仅自己；非空 = 自己+列表中人。囚犯/奴隶产主时亦不默认允许殖民者（7.4）

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.overflowAccumulator
member.summary: 满池溢出：累计溢出量，达到阈值时生成地面污物（不扣水位）

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.lastGatheredTick
member.summary: 10.8-6：最近一次被挤奶的游戏 tick，用于「长时间未挤奶」心情判定

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.ticksFullPool
member.summary: 规格：连续满池（Fullness ≥ 5% maxFullness）的 tick 数，用于乳腺炎堵塞触发

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.lastFullPoolLetterTick
member.summary: 3.3 满池事件：上次发送「需要挤奶」信件的 tick，避免刷屏

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.capacityAdaptation
member.summary: 四层模型（阶段 0.2）：组织适应导致的容量增量，maxFullness = 基础容量 + 本值

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.cachedWasLactatingWithDrugInduced
member.summary: 2.3：药物泌乳状态缓存；仅状态变化时增删 EM_LactatingGain，检查间隔 60 tick

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.OverflowAccumulator
member.summary: 满池溢出累计量（仅 Debug 显示用）

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.hadShrinkLastStep
member.summary: 上一轮 UpdateMilkPools 是否执行过向基础容量的回缩；界面仅在有回缩时显示回缩吸收。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.overflowTriggeredByKey
member.summary: 按池：该侧是否已触发溢出逻辑（本步或之前溢出且尚未回缩到基础容量）；为 true 时该侧停止泌乳进水并每 60 tick 回缩，直到该侧满度≤基础容量后清除。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.IsOverflowState(System.String,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 该侧是否处于溢出状态（已触发溢出且当前高于基础容量），用于停泌乳与回缩判定。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetFullnessForKey(System.String)
member.summary: 按 key 取该乳当前水位，用于健康页悬停等；无该 key 时返回 0

member.name: F:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.cachedEntries
member.summary: 缓存 GetBreastPoolEntries()，每 60 tick 失效，减少每 tick 分配与 GC。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.BreastSideCount
member.summary: 池侧数量（左+右等），用于机器挤奶并行扣量时算每侧速率。使用缓存，避免每 tick 分配。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.BuildPairGroupsByPairIndex(System.Collections.Generic.List{MilkCum.Fluids.Shared.Data.FluidPoolEntry})
member.summary: 按 PairIndex 分组并按 PairIndex 顺序排列，用于 UpdateMilkPools。无 LINQ，减少 GC。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.BuildPairGroupsByFullnessDescending(System.Collections.Generic.List{MilkCum.Fluids.Shared.Data.FluidPoolEntry})
member.summary: 按 PairIndex 分组并按该对总满度降序排列，用于 Drain 选侧（最满的对先扣）。无 LINQ，减少 GC。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetMilkingFlowRate(System.Boolean,MilkCum.Core.Building_Milking)
member.summary: 挤奶时的挤出流速（池单位/秒）：各侧按「该侧满度/该侧容量」算挤出乳压 f² 与该侧 letdown，求和后×基准×种族×机器倍率。手挤用总流速；机器挤用 GetMilkingFlowRatesPerSide 每侧独立、并行。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetMilkingFlowRatesPerSide(System.Boolean,MilkCum.Core.Building_Milking)
member.summary: 各侧的挤出流速（池单位/秒），与 GetCachedEntries() 顺序一致。手挤用其和；机器挤用每侧独立排空、并行，总耗时由最慢一侧决定。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetMilkingFlowRateForSingleSide
member.summary: 吸奶专用：按「即将被吸的那一侧」的流速，选侧规则与 DrainForConsumeSingleSide 一致；复用 GetMilkingFlowRatesPerSide 取该侧流速。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetFirstDrainSideIndex
member.summary: 吸奶/单侧扣量时「第一个会被扣」的侧在 GetCachedEntries() 中的下标；与 DrainForConsumeSingleSide 选侧一致。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetReabsorbedNutritionPerDay
member.summary: 回缩吸收：仅当该侧触发了溢出逻辑且本步有回缩时，界面显示回缩吸收。本方法将回缩量折算为「每日补充营养」；无回缩时返回 0。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.LastGatheredTick
member.summary: 10.8-6：最近一次被挤奶的游戏 tick；供 ThoughtWorker_LongTimeNotMilked 使用

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SyncBaseFullness
member.summary: 将双池总和同步到基类 fullness，供可能读取基类字段的代码使用

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SyncLeftRightFromBreastFullness
member.summary: 从 per-breast 字典汇总到 leftFullness / rightFullness（按 GetBreastPoolEntries 的 IsLeft）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.ClearPools
member.summary: 泌乳结束时清空双池（由 HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating 调用）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.EnsureSaveCompatAllowedLists
member.summary: 读档时调用（PostLoadInit）：确保列表非 null、移除无效引用；名单为空时预填子女/伴侣（仅同地图）。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.Active
member.summary: 仅做纯判断，不修改健康系统。无乳房（无乳池）时不执行泌乳逻辑，见 记忆库 design/泌乳前提-仅在有乳房时。Hediff 的增删在 CompTick 的 EnsureLactatingHediffFromConditions 中执行

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.EnsureLactatingHediffFromConditions
member.summary: 根据基因/物种/设置维护 Lactating Hediff（增删与 Severity），仅在 CompTick 调用，避免 Active getter 产生副作用

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.ApplyDrugInducedLactationEffects
member.summary: 药物诱发泌乳时仅添加泌乳增益 Hediff。每 120 tick 检查一次，状态变化时才增删（有缓存，减少重复查找）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.UpdateMilkPools
member.summary: 水池模型：按对进水；每对仅当两侧都达基础容量后才允许撑大（见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图）。撑大后仍按压力曲线进水，超出撑大部分算溢出（持续微量溢出）。仅当本步发生溢出时才执行池水位回缩与回缩吸收；回缩后满度降低、下一轮压力减小流速恢复，效果上从满池微量进水转为明显泌乳，形成逻辑闭环。回缩时超出基础容量部分每 60 tick 按 ShrinkPerStep 向基础容量收敛，回缩吸收由 GetReabsorbedNutritionPerDay 折算饱食度。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.TrySendFullPoolLetter
member.summary: 3.3 满池事件：满池超过约 1 天且开启设置时，每 2 天最多发一封「需要挤奶」提醒信。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.HandleOverflow(System.Single)
member.summary: 满池溢出：累计溢出量达到阈值时生成地面污物（不扣水位）；污物 Def 由设置指定

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SetFullness(System.Single,System.Nullable{System.Single})
member.summary: 设置总奶量（0～上限）。从各乳池按比例缩放到目标总水量。
member.param: 目标总水量
可选；不传时用 maxFullness 为上限；传时用于 clamp（如关压力因子时用撑大总容量）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.DrainForConsume(System.Single,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: 吸奶/挤奶时从池中扣量：按「哪对最满」优先（总满度高的对先扣），同对内先扣较满的一侧，相同时先左（与性别无关）。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图；记忆库 design/双池与PairIndex、记忆库/decisions/ADR-003-选侧先左。
member.param: 要扣的池单位量（与 Charge/Fullness 同单位）
若非 null，会填入本次被扣量的池侧 key（用于按侧加喷乳反射刺激
member.returns: 实际扣掉的量

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.DrainForConsumeSingleSide(System.Single,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: 吸奶专用：只从「当前最满的一侧」扣量（一口只能吸一侧）。选侧与 GetFirstDrainSideIndex 一致。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.DrainForConsumeParallel(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Single},System.Single,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: 机器挤奶专用：每侧按「该侧流速」独立并行扣量；总扣量不超过 remainingCap。每侧本 tick 最多扣 ratePerSidePerTick[i]（与 GetCachedEntries 顺序一致），若各侧拟扣量之和超过 remainingCap 则按比例缩减。用于左 2.5 秒、右 1 秒同步进行，总耗时由最慢的一侧决定。
member.param: 每侧本 tick 最多扣的池单位量，顺序同 GetCachedEntries()
本 tick 总扣量上限（通常 = amountToTake - totalDrained）
若非 null，会填入本次被扣量的池侧 key
member.returns: 实际扣掉的总量

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SpawnBottlesForDrainedAmount(System.Single,Verse.Pawn,MilkCum.Core.Building_Milking)
member.summary: 流速驱动挤奶：根据已扣池总量生成奶瓶并处理心情/乳腺炎等（不再次扣池）。由 JobDriver 按速率逐 tick 扣池后调用。1 池单位 = 1 瓶，不做采集加成。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.HasTorsoOrBreastInjury(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 是否有躯干/乳房损伤；委托给 MilkRelatedHealthHelper，供炎症模型等使用

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.AllowedToBeAutoFedBy(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 是否允许被该泌乳者自动喂食。仅看 canBeFed 开关；不再使用「谁可以喂我」列表

member.name: T:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompProperties_PartialMilk
member.summary: 未满一瓶的人奶：存储实际取量（0~1 池单位），食用时营养按此值计算。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Fluids.Lactation.Comps.CompPartialMilk

member.name: P:MilkCum.Fluids.Shared.Data.FluidPoolEntry.FlowMultiplier

member.name: T:MilkCum.Fluids.Shared.Data.FluidPoolState

member.name: M:MilkCum.Fluids.Shared.Data.FluidPoolState.TickShrink(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)

member.name: T:MilkCum.Harmony.StatWorker_ShouldShowFor_Patch
member.summary: 信息卡统计 NRE 全局防护。StatsReportUtility.StatsToDraw 会枚举分类下所有 StatDef 并调用 Worker.ShouldShowFor(req)。 任一 StatWorker（原版或 mod）在 req 无 Pawn、或 Pawn 下某属性为 null 时都可能 NRE，导致列表错位与 ArgumentOutOfRangeException。 Prefix：req.Pawn == null 时直接返回 false 并跳过原方法。 Finalizer：原方法或其它 patch 抛出的任何异常都吞掉并设 __result = false，避免崩溃；该 stat 仅不显示。 见 ADR-004、报错修复记录。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Harmony.StatWorker_ShouldShowFor_Patch.Finalizer(System.Exception,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: 兜底：ShouldShowFor 内任意 NRE/异常都视为「不显示」并吞掉，避免信息卡崩溃。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Harmony.FillTab_Delegate

member.name: M:MilkCum.Harmony.Hediff_Pregnant_Patch.DoBirthSpawn_Prefix(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 设计原则 2/7：仅 Prefix 挂接，不替换原版 DoBirthSpawn。分娩结束时为母亲添加 Lactating 并调用 ApplyBirthPoolValues；动物与人类（Biotech）统一处理。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Harmony.Need_Food_Patch.GetTipString_PostFix(RimWorld.Need_Food,System.String@)
member.summary: 为饱食度悬停提示追加「饥饿率」拆解：当前饥饿档位、各 hediff 的 hungerRateFactor/hungerRateFactorOffset、最终乘数。本 mod 的 Lactating 已不用饥饿率，但可显示其他 hediff（如戒断）的影响。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Harmony.HediffSet_Remove_Patch
member.summary: Lactating 被任意方式移除时（含其他 mod 直接 RemoveHediff）同步清空双池，保证池与 hediff 一致。本 mod 内通过 ResetAndRemoveLactating 会先 ClearPools 再 RemoveHediff，此处兜底。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Harmony.ProlactinAddictionPatch
member.summary: 设计原则 1：耐受/成瘾交给原版。本补丁仅挂接服用催乳剂后的「水池模型」逻辑（移除刚加的 Lactating、入队延迟、AddFromDrug）；成瘾判定与概率、耐受增减由原版 ChemicalDef + CompProperties_Drug + outcomeDoers/SeverityPerDay 驱动，此处不手写。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Harmony.BreastPoolTooltipHelper.BuildBreastPairBlock(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Single,System.Single,System.Boolean}},System.String,Verse.Pawn)

member.name: T:MilkCum.Harmony.HediffComp_SexPart_CompTipStringExtra_Patch
member.summary: 在 RJW 乳房行悬停（HediffComp_SexPart.CompTipStringExtra）后追加奶池块。仅当「有泌乳且当前为 RJW 乳房行」时追加；没有泌乳不追加，非乳房行不追加（genitalFamily != Breasts 已 return）。若 __result 中已包含本块（同一 getter 被调用两次并拼接时会重复），则不再追加以免同一悬浮内出现两份相同内容。

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility
member.summary:
Initializes and Manages both the "Per Body-Part" Splashes on Bukkake as well as their controllers.
DevNote: Initially, the Bukkake implementation from Ed86-Cum had two mechanics that got removed. 1) The body-parts had a "Overspill" logic which means that if your chest was full, you'd get splashes on the arms and legs. 2) The Controller would calculate itself regularly. This is now done upon spawning parts and the controller just ticks down.
Also, all drawing got removed. The drawing framework people should take care of that (#Innocent)

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility.CanBeCovered(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: Simple check if the pawn can be covered with fluids. Only some sanity checks and ruling animals out.
member.param: The pawn that might be covered.
member.returns: True if the pawn can be covered by fluid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility.PartitionSeverity(System.Single,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Partitions a float into a sub-list of smaller floats whose sum is the initialSeverity. There will be atmost 3 * initialseverity parts, or max_parts, whatever is smaller. The size of each partition is capped at 1.0 (default).
member.param: Max number of partitions to create, default capped at 10
Max value for each entry, default capped at 1.0
member.returns: A list of floats whose sum is the original severity.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility.TicksToCleanSplashFromSelf(Verse.Hediff,System.Single)
member.summary: Looks up the ticks (time) required to clean a splash from a body-part. In case of any error, null value or other issues, 240 (2s) is returned, which was the original cleanup time from frameworks. If the severity is lower (or higher) than 1, it is considerd as a linear co-efficient.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Bukkake.HediffCompProperties_SpawnOrAdjustControllerHediff.summedSeverityRequiredForFullController
member.summary: How many of the sub-hediffs severity are required to have a 1.0 Severity of the corresponding Controller. Default 4.5 "full" (=Severity 1.0) parts to reach the full bukkake. For a normal pawn, there should be 6 or 7 bodyparts, so 4.5 is already quite a lot.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Common.DefModExtension_PawnTargetting.blockingHediffs
member.summary: A list of hediffs that block spawning of this Hediff. If any is present, at any severity other than 0, `CanTargetPawn` will return false.

member.summary: Tries to store a record of `FluidSource` in a given Hediff. In case the Hediff does not have a `HediffComp_SourceStorage` nothing will happen. If there already exists a Storage Entry for this Pawn and this fluid, it will be increased by the incoming amount.

The pawn that originated the Fluid
The type of fluid
The amount of fluid

member.returns: True, if the pawn likes cumflation from traits, quirks or zoophile.

member.summary: Scale the chance based on severity. If Chance is 50% and Severity is 50%, then there is a 25% final chance.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Common.HediffCompProperties_RandomlySpawnFilth.onlyAtStagesHigherThan
member.summary: Only try to spawn filth if the current stage is higher than the specified number.

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Common.HediffComp_ChangeFluidfactorBasedOnSeverity
member.summary:
Adjusts the targetted SexParts fluid-amount based on a linear factor between a configured Max and Min value.
Example: Max 5, Min 2 Severity 100% -> 5.0 Severity 50% -> 3.5 Severity 0% -> 2.0 Severity 33% -> 3.0 Severity 66% -> 4.0 Severity 250% -> 5.0

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.MapUtility.PawnIsOnHomeMap(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary:
Checks if the pawn is on the players home map.
Reason is that drones should only be punished for absence of queen if they are on the map and there is no queen. If they are on a mission, transport-pod etc. they should not get boni or mali.
member.param: The pawn for which to check map-presence.
member.returns: True if the pawn is on the home-map, False otherwise.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.PartUtility.FindFittingSexParts(Verse.Pawn,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
This method finds all relevant, targetted parts as specified.
A sanity check, if the pawn is valid / healthy and matches the configuration, is done earlier in `IsValidPawn`.
member.param: The pawn for which to find SexParts.
Consider Penises (using `RJW.PartHelper.Is_Penis`)
Consider Vaginas (using `RJW.PartHelper.Is_Vagina`)
Consider Breasts (using HomeBrew helper)
Consider Anus (using `RJW.PartHelper.Is_Anus`)
Consider SexParts that are not in any other category
only return the first (fitting) part.
only return parts that have fluid.
member.returns: All targetted SexParts of the pawn, or an empty List on Errors.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.PartUtility.IsValidPawn(Verse.Pawn,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Verse.HediffDef},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RimWorld.TraitDef},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Does a bunch of checks on a pawn, if it is a valid target.
member.param: The pawn to check
Men are valid targets (Using RW.Gender)
Women are valid targets (using RW.Gender)
Futas are valid targets (using RJW.GenderUtility.IsFuta); Futa is checked before men and women.
Animals are valid targets.
Return an empty list if any of the HediffDefs is present at a severity other than 0.
member.returns: True if the pawn is a valid target, false if it cannot be targeted

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Cumflation.CumflationUtility.DetermineCumflationSeverity(Verse.Pawn,System.Single,rjw.SexFluidDef)
member.summary:
Calculates the resulting Cumflation-Severity relative to the fluid-amount and pawns body size. Also used to determine "overflow".
This method is also used to determine "cumstuffed" despite the name.
member.param: The pawn that might be cumflated
The amount of fluid coming in.
FluidDef, optional for patching.
member.returns: The severity of the resulting cumflation

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Cumflation.CumflationUtility.FluidAmountRequiredToCumflatePawn(Verse.Pawn,rjw.SexFluidDef)
member.summary:
We assume a simple relation: 100 fluid per 1 Bodysize. The returning value will determine how much of the fluid is necessary for 1.0 cumflation severity.
This might be altered with Patches etc. or extra behaviour, which is why this is a separate method despite very simple logic.
member.param: The pawn for which
Optional for patches: For which fluid to check.
member.returns: A number how much fluid amount is necessary for a "full" cumflation, i.E. a cumflation result resulting in 1.0 cumflation severity.

member.summary: Note: The Cumstuffed Hediff MUST have a `HediffComp_SharedSeverityPerDay` otherwise there will be issues.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.StuffingDef.amountOfFluidForFullStuffing
member.summary: The amount of Fluid required for making a 1.0 Severity Hediff of the relative xxx-stuffing.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.StuffingDef.thoughtThreshold
member.summary: How much severity does the resulting stuffing must have to give a thought?

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffCompProperties_SharedSeverityPerDay
member.summary:
Extension to the "HediffComp_SeverityPerDay" that adjusts depending on how many Hediffs with this Comp are present.
Example: You have 1 hediff with `-0.10` SeverityPerDay. It will behave as normal. Example 2: You have 3 hediffs with `-0.15` SeverityPerDay each. Because you have three, they will effectively reduce by `-0.05` each day, resulting in a "global" reduction of 0.15 amongst all.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffCompProperties_VomitFluidMtb.mtbDays
member.summary: "mean time between" measured in days. If set to 1, there will be 1 vomiting per days (in random occurrence). If set to 2, there will be 0.5 vomiting per days, etc. If set to 0.1, there will be 10 vomitings per days

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffCompProperties_VomitFluidMtb.scaleWithSeverity
member.summary: If true, the "chance" of application is scaled with the Severity of the Stuffing. So if your stuffing is 1.0, it will have a "full mtbDays". Otherwise, if your stuffing is 0.5, it will will result in half as much Vomiting.

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffComp_SharedSeverityPerDay
member.summary:
Extension to the "HediffComp_SeverityPerDay" that adjusts depending on how many Hediffs with this Comp are present.
Example: You have 1 hediff with `-0.10` SeverityPerDay. It will behave as normal. Example 2: You have 3 hediffs with `-0.15` SeverityPerDay each. Because you have three, they will effectively reduce by `-0.05` each day, resulting in a "global" reduction of 0.15 amongst all.

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Reactions.IngestionOutcomeDoer_RecordEatenFluid
member.summary:
Handles the updating (and thought-giving) when pawns consume meals with fluid based ingredients.
To work, there need to be two defs: - A RecordFluidMappingDef - The IngestionOutComeDoer
Originally, this was from Amaverashi-Sexperience but extended for multiple fluids. https://gitgud.io/amevarashi/rjw-sexperience/-/blob/master/Source/RJWSexperience/Cum/IngestionOutcomeDoer_RecordEatenCum.cs?ref_type=heads

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Reactions.Patches.Patch_IngestMeal_UpdateRecordAndGiveThoughts
member.summary:
I have one IngestionOutcomeDoer but it's not enough. The individual outcome-doers are not used in meals. This triggers all (relevant) ingredients to give their thoughts. This also means that if a meal is made of cum and insect jelly, the eater will get two thoughts.
TODO: Right now, the "NumEaten" is updated, but the "AmountEaten" is buggy. But as it gives the right thoughts, I am decently happy for now.
